name: leader-key-raycast
title: Leader Key
description: Leader Key discoverability and fast config editing for Raycast
author: arabshaptukaev

preferences.name: configDirectory
preferences.title: Config Directory
preferences.description: Leader Key config directory. Defaults to ~/Library/Application Support/Leader Key.

preferences.name: preferredEditor
preferences.title: Preferred Editor
preferences.description: Editor used by Open in Editor actions.

commands.name: search-shortcuts
commands.title: Search Shortcuts
commands.description: Search across effective Leader Key shortcuts and jump to the source item fast.

commands.name: browse-configs
commands.title: Browse Configs
commands.description: Browse effective configs, edit items, and create overrides or siblings.

commands.name: add-edit-by-path
commands.title: Add/Edit by Path
commands.description: Type a Leader Key path like ab.c to edit or create the target fast.

commands.name: rebuild-index
commands.title: Rebuild Index
commands.description: Force a rebuild of the cached Leader Key shortcut index.

commands.name: sync-goku-profile
commands.title: Sync Goku Profile
commands.description: Ask Leader Key to migrate the current Goku EDN profile into the karabiner.ts workspace.

commands.name: command-scout
commands.title: Command Scout
commands.description: Open Command Scout in Leader Key for an app config to discover and add shortcuts.
